name: Pinpoint
description_short: Pinpoint Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative based in Milton, PA, offering comprehensive financial services including investment planning, loans, and member rewards programs.
description_long:
Pinpoint Federal Credit Union was founded in Milton, Pennsylvania as a member-owned financial cooperative dedicated to providing quality service to its members. As a credit union, it operates as a not-for-profit organization with NCUA insurance protection, distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks. The institution serves its community by focusing on member benefits and financial education rather than shareholder profits.

Pinpoint offers a diverse range of financial products and services including share accounts (savings), share certificates (CDs), personal and business lending, investment services, and member rewards programs. Their investment services are particularly comprehensive, featuring a dedicated Investment Center with financial planning, wealth management, and ongoing advisory guidance. The credit union partners with Cetera Wealth Services to provide securities and advisory services, with certified financial planners available for consultation.

The institution distinguishes itself through localized, relationship-based banking with a focus on long-term member financial health. They emphasize coordinated financial planning that addresses the complete financial picture, from investment strategy to income protection. Their team includes CERTIFIED FINANCIAL PLANNER™ practitioners and experienced financial advisors who provide complimentary account reviews and personalized guidance.

Pinpoint is best suited for individuals and families seeking membership-based banking with investment advisory services. However, their website content is limited in detail regarding specific loan products, rates, membership eligibility criteria, and fee structures. The credit union appears to be a regional institution focused on personal and investment services rather than specialized lending products.
services: Online member login and account management
Securities services through Cetera Wealth Services
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means earnings are returned to members rather than shareholders
NCUA insurance protection on deposit accounts up to standard limits
Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Certified Plan Fiduciary Advisor staff available for investment guidance
Complimentary, no-pressure financial account reviews offered to members
Comprehensive investment services including financial planning and wealth management
My Rewards program providing member incentives
Local presence in Milton, PA with direct phone support (570) 742-3903
cons: Website provides minimal detail on specific loan products, rates, terms, or eligibility requirements
Limited information about membership eligibility criteria and how to join
No disclosure of fees, minimum balances, or other account requirements visible on website
Investment services disclaim that they are not NCUA insured and not deposit-backed
Regional institution may have limited geographic accessibility compared to national credit unions
best_for: Members seeking investment advisory services from certified financial planners
Individuals prioritizing member-owned banking over for-profit banking models
Local Milton, PA area residents looking for relationship-based financial services
People interested in comprehensive financial planning and wealth coordination
diagnosis: Pinpoint Federal Credit Union is best for members in the Milton, PA area or eligible populations seeking member-owned banking with investment advisory capabilities. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparent disclosure of specific loan products, rates, fees, and membership requirements, making it difficult for prospective members to evaluate offerings before contacting the institution directly.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Pinpoint — Credit Union in MILTON, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Pinpoint — NCUA-insured credit union in MILTON, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
